title: Define a Command and Arguments for a Container — Run a command in a shell
text:
In some cases, you need your command to run in a shell. For example, your
command might consist of several commands piped together, or it might be a shell
script. To run your command in a shell, wrap it like this:
command:
[
"/bin/sh"
]
args:
[
"-c"
,
"while true; do echo hello; sleep 10;done"
]

Learn more about
configuring pods and containers
.
Learn more about
running commands in a container
.
See
Container
.
